name_en: M81405 Blue Flower Embossed Silk Print This Brazza wallet features new Taurillon Illusion leather, making the Monogram embossing appear like a sprayed gradient fluorescent effect, with card slots and dividers. Dimensions: 10 x 19 x 2 cm
